title: Advancement Plaques GV
description: This texture pack will replace the progress bar in the advancement plaques fashion with an interface like an the voice of time.
body:
This resource pack replaces the standard appearance of the plates with improvements to the interface, as in an the voice of time.

Note: This resource package requires Advancement Plaques to work.
![example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e0d33c400dac145db8c76f2beb381d40c2949549.png)
